What We Do

Our Services

01
Listing

Strategic listing services to showcase your property at its finest — professional marketing, expert pricing, and white-glove service from listing to closing.

02
Buying

Expert guidance through every step of your home purchase in Texas — from first showing to final closing with dedicated advocacy on your behalf.

03
Leasing

Full-service leasing solutions for landlords and tenants alike — tenant screening, lease negotiation, and property management support.

04
Commercial

Connecting Texas businesses with spaces that enable growth — retail, office, industrial, and mixed-use commercial properties.

What Our Clients Say

★★★★★

"Karina came highly recommended by an associate of my wife. From the beginning of our buying journey, all the way up to the end, Karina was incredible. She happily answered every one of our rookie questions and facilitated all of our communications with Lennar. Her bilingual skills were near flawless with my wife who speaks only Spanish. Thank you so much for being our guide on this adventure. Will highly recommend to anyone."

© 2026 Constellation Property Group · All City Real Estate Ltd. Co · All rights reserved.  Privacy Policy

Instagram LinkedIn Facebook

Privacy Policy

Effective Date: January 1, 2025  ·  Last Updated: March 2026

1. Introduction

Constellation Property Group (“we,” “us,” or “our”), a real estate brokerage operating under All City Real Estate Ltd. Co in Buda, Texas, is committed to protecting the privacy of our clients, prospects, and website visitors. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your personal information when you interact with our website, contact forms, or team members.

By submitting information through our contact form or communicating with us, you agree to the practices described in this policy.

2. Information We Collect

We may collect the following types of personal information:

  • Contact Information: Your name, email address, phone number, and mailing address.
  • Communication Preferences: Whether you have consented to or opted out of being contacted by phone, email, or text.
  • Real Estate Interests: Information about the type of service you are seeking (buying, selling, renting, leasing, or investing) and your property preferences.
  • Usage Data: Non-personal data such as browser type, pages visited, and time spent on our website, collected via standard web analytics tools.

3. How We Use Your Information

  • To respond to your inquiries and provide real estate services tailored to your needs.
  • To contact you via phone, email, or text message about properties, listings, and services — only if you have provided consent.
  • To maintain records of client interactions in compliance with Texas real estate regulations.
  • To improve our website, marketing, and client experience.
  • To comply with applicable laws and regulatory requirements.

4. Text Message & TCPA Consent

By selecting “I agree” on our contact form, you expressly consent to receive calls, emails, and text messages from Constellation Property Group regarding real estate services. Message and data rates may apply. Message frequency may vary.

To opt out at any time, reply STOP to any text message from us, reply HELP for assistance, or click the unsubscribe link in any email. Consent is not a condition of purchase or service. We will not share your mobile number with third parties for marketing purposes.

5. How We Share Your Information

  • Service Providers: Trusted third parties who assist us in operating our business (e.g., CRM platforms, email services), under strict confidentiality agreements.
  • Brokerage: With All City Real Estate Ltd. Co as required by our brokerage relationship and Texas real estate law.
  • Legal Requirements: When required by law, court order, or regulatory authority.
  • Business Transfers: In the event of a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets, your information may be transferred as part of that transaction.

6. Data Retention

We retain your personal information as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this policy, or as required by applicable law. Client transaction records may be retained for a minimum of four (4) years in accordance with Texas Real Estate Commission (TREC) requirements.

7. Your Rights

You may have the right to access, correct, or request deletion of your personal information, and to withdraw consent to being contacted at any time. To exercise these rights, contact us at [email protected] or (254) 630-3333.

8. Cookies & Analytics

Our website may use cookies or similar technologies to analyze traffic and improve user experience. You may disable cookies in your browser settings, though some site features may not function as a result.

9. Security

We implement reasonable administrative, technical, and physical safeguards to protect your personal information. No method of internet transmission is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

10. Children’s Privacy

Our services are not directed to individuals under 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from minors. If you believe we have done so inadvertently, please contact us immediately.

11. Changes to This Policy

We reserve the right to update this Privacy Policy at any time. Changes will be reflected by updating the “Last Updated” date above. Continued use of our services constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.

12. Contact Us
